title: taraxacum stevenii
intro: Taraxacum stevenii, also known as Steven's dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is known to possess medicinal properties, including its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and diuretic, which can aid in reducing inflammation and promoting urine production. The health benefits of Taraxacum stevenii include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and act as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum stevenii can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
